---
title: "GLSResult"
generated: true
description: "Per-voxel GLS fit with a structured residual."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._corrfit`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GLSResult -->
```python
class GLSResult
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:GLSResult -->
Per-voxel GLS fit with a structured residual.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:GLSResult.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(beta_hat: Float[Array, 'V p'], sigma_e_sq: Float[Array, 'V'], rho: Float[Array, 'V'], var_params: Float[Array, 'V n_v'], log_lik: Float[Array, 'V'], fixed_cov: Float[Array, 'V p p'], df_resid: int, corr: str, weights: Optional[str]) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:GLSResult -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `n_v` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
